# AI Agent Working Agreement

## Objective

Deliver PFL v1.0 using small, reviewable increments.

## Rules

- Follow Repository Governance.
- Follow Architecture Decisions (ADR).
- Do not introduce new architecture without approval.
- One Issue = One Deliverable.
- Prefer simplicity over cleverness.
- Preserve immutable ledger principles.
- Write documentation when implementation changes behavior.

## Workflow

Backlog
→ Ready
→ In Progress
→ Review
→ Testing
→ Done

## Completion Criteria

- Acceptance criteria satisfied.
- Tests pass.
- Documentation updated.
- Ready for merge.
